title: The ERDA Book – Democratic Evolution: Strategy, Ethics and the Future of Europe
description: Open-access book project on the strategic, ethical and technological renewal of Europe. Version 2.0.0 (in preparation) builds on the established multilingual repository structure (/de, /en) and extends the content with a substantially expanded AI governance chapter (Chapter 10), including an executive summary for decision-makers and Appendix 10.A (Co-evolution Index, KEI) as a democratic maturity/early-warning instrument. New chapters cover citizen resilience (Chapter 11), democratic transformation rules (Chapter 12), strategic sovereignty and defence toolbox (Chapter 13), and democratic coalitions of the willing with a constitutional sketch and six treaty annexes (Chapter 14). The GitBook worker tooling is maintained upstream and consumed here as a pinned package artifact. Texts: CC BY-SA 4.0; Code & toolchain: MIT; Fonts: CC BY 4.0 or MIT (dual licence). Full source files (GitBook Markdown), CI/CD configuration and build setup are available in the repository.
notes: Licence matrix: Texts, graphics and diagrams = CC BY-SA 4.0; Code, toolchain and scripts = MIT; self-developed fonts = CC BY 4.0 or MIT (dual licence); emojis = Twemoji (CC BY 4.0). Each language edition is maintained in its own repository folder with dedicated licensing, citation, attribution and publication configuration. CI/CD workflows support parallel multilingual builds.
